chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ تُطْعَمَ الْحُبْلَى وَ النُّفَسَاءُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – What is recommended to feed the pregnant and (during) bleeding following childbirth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/39)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/39)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ نَظَرَ إِلَى غُلَامٍ جَمِيلٍ يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يَكُونَ أَبُو هَذَا الْغُلَامِ آكِلَ السَّفَرْجَلِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Taymuli, from Al Husayn Bin Hashim, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazzaz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said and looked at a beautiful boy: ‘It is a must that the father of this boy would have eaten the quince’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan al-Taymuliy, from al-Husayn ibn Hashim from abu Ayyub al-Khazzaz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, while looking at a beautiful boy said, ‘It seems the father of this boy had been eating quince.’”
